testcase.name: test_admin_login

failure.message: AssertionError: No session token in response assert 'session_token' in {'message': 'Login successful', 'success': True, 'user': {'email': 'thaha.pakayil@gmail.com', 'name': 'Thaha Pakayil', 'permissions_count': 131, 'picture': 'https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name=Thaha+Pakayil&background=2563eb&color=fff', ...}}

testcase.name: test_nonexistent_lead

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 404 for nonexistent lead, got 401 assert 401 == 404 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_timeline_adjustment.py:488: in test_nonexistent_lead assert response.status_code == 404, f"Expected 404 for nonexistent lead, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 404 for nonexistent lead, got 401 E assert 401 == 404 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
